verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Pictures and photographs, Memories of old Stories in every frame, That's never yet been told And there's a picture in the kitchen That displays the supper scene There's a meaning within the frame, Until now I've never seen.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: How could He desire To have a fellowship with me There must be something more within That only He can see I pray dear Lord, Take all my life, I give it all to thee Grant it everyday, You commune with me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: On the road to Emmaus, Three men walked one day As they reach their destination The two men begged the third to stay And as they shared together, Breaking bread and pouring wine I finally now realized The simplicity of his sign.
